title: PTCL Privatization
description: The privatization of national telecom providers and the launch of early FTTH services began the massive shift away from dial-up.

title: DSL Rollout
description: Widespread DSL deployment significantly dropped subscription prices, transforming broadband from a luxury into a household utility.

title: 100 Mbps & EVO
description: The introduction of 100 Mbps fiber and EVO 3G USB devices gave consumers their first taste of high-speed portable internet.
